problem: How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood?
mechanism: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier
hypothesis: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier may resolve How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 20 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
